name: Sanity
description: Sanity is a composable content platform with real-time collaboration. Use this API to query content with GROQ, manage documents, upload assets, and listen to real-time content changes.

capabilities.name: query_content
capabilities.description: Query content using GROQ (Graph-Relational Object Queries).

capabilities.name: mutate_documents
capabilities.description: Create, update, patch, and delete documents in your dataset.

capabilities.name: get_document
capabilities.description: Retrieve one or more documents by their IDs.

capabilities.name: upload_asset
capabilities.description: Upload images and files to the Sanity asset pipeline.

capabilities.name: listen_changes
capabilities.description: Listen to real-time content changes via server-sent events.
